direction: reuse internal-edge depth ratio after OSHER calls
rationale: CalculateFluxKernel computes fmin(HC / QR[0], 1.5) or fmin(HC2 / QR1[0], 1.5) to form the reconstructed normal velocity, then recomputes the same divide/min after OSHER to assemble FLR(1). Keeping the ratio in a local register removes a redundant division and min on internal edges without changing the flux operands.
